description_long: This is a robust, ornately decorated metal lantern with a domed top and a wide, circular base. The upper section features intricate engraved patterns and motifs, giving it a traditional and antique appearance. The lantern's body is solid, with a series of open, curved supports at the bottom that allow light to escape. A prominent, flat-topped knob sits at the very top, likely serving as a mounting or carrying point. The surface has a dark, aged bronze or brass finish, with subtle highlights that accentuate the engraved details. The overall design suggests it is intended for ceiling or overhead mounting, typical of historical or vintage urban lighting fixtures.
description: A dark, ornately engraved metal lantern with a domed top, open lower supports, and a prominent mounting knob, finished in aged bronze or brass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved dome, wide base, and open lower supports with the top knob clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the engraved patterns and the curvature of the open supports beneath the dome.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the rounded dome, engraved motifs, and the symmetrical arrangement of the lower supports.
description_view_3: Rear view with the engraved dome and open supports visible, showing the lantern's consistent decorative detailing.
